positive: A mesmerizing, symmetrical celestial flora arrangement centered in a clean composition. The design features glowing, stylized botanicals, intricate geometric mandalas, and nebulous cosmic dust rendered in deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and stark gold line work. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern vector art, featuring sharp silhouettes and high contrast against a solid, light cream background. The illumination is soft, ethereal bioluminescence emanating from the plants themselves. Composition must be highly central, designed specifically for seamless apparel printing, utilizing strong contrast and clean edges for maximum print clarity. Flat graphic design, vector illustration, maximalist minimalism.
negative: photo, photorealistic, grainy, blurry, bokeh, watermark, signature, text, logos, gradients, gradient shading, noise, oversaturation, extra limbs, deformed, bad anatomy, clutter, messy, low quality
